# Flask of Stardust
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Flask%20of%20Stardust&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Flask of Stardust
| desc = A flask filled with glittering stardust, combined with the venom of a cosmic dragon, able to bring down any foe.
| slot = poison
| tier = GL
| soulbound = yes

| totalDamage = 940
| impactDamage = 215
| radius = 5
| cost = 105
| fameb = 6

| effects = yes
| poison = 725
| poisonDuration = 4.5

| bonuses = {{Stat|vit|3}} {{Stat|wis|3}}

| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in White Bags dropped by: [[Cracked Core]]. [[The Zucc]] and [[L. Bandito]].
}}

<noinclude>
{{NavPoisons}}
[[Category:Poisons]]
</noinclude>
